# Pharelo — Walk in prepared. Walk out clear.

Pharelo helps you organize your thoughts before every appointment, capture what matters during the visit, and understand everything after.

---

## The Problem

You forgot the one question that mattered. The doctor talked fast and you nodded along. You left and couldn't remember what they said. You got home and realized you missed half the story.

---

## How It Works

### Before — Prepare with confidence
Build a checklist of questions, symptoms, and topics you want to cover. Never walk in empty-handed again.

### During — Capture every detail
Record your appointment with live transcription. Stay present in the conversation while Pharelo keeps track.

### After — Understand what happened
Get a clear summary of what was discussed, what was decided, and what to do next. Share it with family or your care team.

---

## Meet Beacon — Your AI Companion

Beacon surfaces personalized suggestions before your visit and generates clear summaries after. Like a friend who remembers everything your doctor said.

---

## Signals — Health Insights

Signals tracks health themes across your appointments over time. Patterns emerge that a single visit can't show — giving you and your care team a fuller picture.

---

## Who It's For

### Managing a chronic condition
You see three specialists, a primary care doctor, and a therapist. Each has a piece of the puzzle, but none of them see the whole picture. Pharelo helps you carry the full story into every room.

### Caring for a parent
You're coordinating appointments, medications, and follow-ups for someone who can't always do it themselves. Pharelo keeps track so you can focus on being there.

### Facing a big appointment
The specialist visit you've been waiting weeks for. You have twenty minutes and a hundred questions. Pharelo helps you walk in with a plan and walk out with answers.

---

## Waitlist

Join the waitlist and be the first to know when Pharelo is ready.

---

## Support

Contact: team@pharelo.com

### Frequently Asked Questions

**I'm having trouble logging in. What should I do?**
Try resetting your password using the "Forgot password" link on the login screen. If the issue persists, contact us and we'll help you regain access to your account.

**How do I delete my account or personal data?**
You can request account deletion directly from the app's settings, or email us at team@pharelo.com. We'll process your request and confirm deletion within 5 business days.

**Is my health information safe?**
Yes. All health-related data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We never sell your data to third parties. See our Privacy Policy for full details on how we handle your information.

**How do I manage or cancel my subscription?**
Subscriptions are managed through your Apple ID. Go to Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions on your iPhone to view, modify, or cancel your Pharelo subscription.

**How can I share feedback or suggest a feature?**
We'd love to hear from you. Email us directly at team@pharelo.com. Every piece of feedback helps shape the future of Pharelo.

---

## Privacy Policy (last updated February 2026)

**Data we collect**: We collect information you provide directly, such as account details, appointment notes, and voice recordings you choose to capture. We also collect usage data to improve the app experience.

**How we use it**: Your data is used to power the features you rely on — organizing appointments, generating summaries, and helping you prepare for visits. We do not sell your data to third parties.

**Health data**: Pharelo may process health-related information you choose to enter. This data is treated with the highest level of care and encrypted both in transit and at rest. We comply with applicable health data regulations.

**Third-party services**: We use select third-party services to operate Pharelo, including cloud hosting and AI processing. These partners are bound by strict data protection agreements.

**Your rights**: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can also request a copy of your data or ask us to stop processing it.

**Contact**: If you have questions about this policy, please reach out to us at team@pharelo.com.

---

## Terms of Service (last updated February 2026)

**Acceptance of terms**: By accessing or using Pharelo, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.

**Description of service**: Pharelo is a mobile application designed to help you prepare for, document, and follow up on medical appointments. The app provides organizational tools, AI-assisted question preparation, and appointment summaries.

**Medical disclaimer**: Pharelo is not a medical device and does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. The AI features are designed to help you organize your thoughts and form questions — not to replace professional medical guidance. Always consult with a qualified healthcare provider.

**User accounts**: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You agree to provide accurate information and to update it as needed. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms.

**Limitation of liability**: Pharelo is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the app, including but not limited to medical decisions made based on information organized through Pharelo.

**Changes to terms**: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of Pharelo after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

**Contact**: If you have questions about these terms, please reach out to us at team@pharelo.com.

---

## Important Disclaimer

Pharelo is not a medical device and does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult with a qualified healthcare provider for medical decisions.
